metric_name: Replacement interval bins used in survey
notes: 9 bins for past policy and next-12-months policy.
Designed to detect lengthening of desktop lifecycles.

metric_name: Corporate PC lifecycle thesis behind survey
metric_value: Corporate PC replacement intervals are lengthening from the traditional 3-year cycle as post-bubble IT budget pressure combines with diminished year-over-year performance gains.
notes: Kastner's analytical motivation for fielding the instrument.
